query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as total_stocks,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN date >= '2024-11-01' AND date <= '2024-11-30' THEN ticker END) as stocks_with_nov_data,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN date >= '2024-10-01' AND date <= '2024-10-31' THEN ticker END) as stocks_with_oct_data
FROM historicalPrices;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as total_stocks,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN date >= '2024-11-01' AND date <= '2024-11-30' THEN ticker END) as stocks_with_nov_data,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN date >= '2024-10-01' AND date <= '2024-10-31' THEN ticker END) as stocks_with_oct_data
FROM historicalPrices;
